notes: Returns the user-facing appearance control to Streamlit's built-in System, Light and Dark menu.
Removes Pathmark's separate appearance selector so Streamlit's menu does not look like a broken duplicate feature.
Keeps Pathmark seasonal themes as Summer, Autumn, Winter and Spring, with light/dark variants mirrored from the Streamlit menu.
Adds stronger event binding around the visible Streamlit appearance controls to apply Pathmark dark and light variants when users select System, Light or Dark.
Keeps a manual Sync with Streamlit appearance fallback in Settings without adding a second appearance choice.
release_notes: Returns appearance control to Streamlit's own menu while applying Pathmark seasonal light/dark variants from that selection.
label: Streamlit-controlled appearance variant repair
